description: Disable the water surface visualization to reveal ocean floor bathymetry, then navigate to the Axial Seamount (~45.95°N, 130.01°W). Create a placemark named 'Axial Seamount' at the summit with description 'Active submarine volcano, Juan de Fuca Ridge'. Save a screenshot showing the exposed seafloor topography to /home/ga/Documents/axial_seamount_survey.png.

metadata.geographic_feature: Axial Seamount - Juan de Fuca Ridge
